seoTitle: How to Convert PNG to SVG in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Convert PNG images to scalable SVG format in Canva for logos, icons, and graphics that need to resize without losing quality.
intro: SVG files scale cleanly at any size, which makes them the better choice for logos and icons compared to a standard PNG. This guide walks through uploading a PNG, editing it, and downloading it as an SVG in Canva. It's aimed at graphic designers and business owners who need flexible, high-quality vector graphics for branding.

steps.heading: Upload your PNG file
steps.body: Bring your existing PNG image into Canva to begin the conversion process.

steps.heading: Edit the image as needed
steps.body: Make any adjustments to the design before converting so the final SVG matches what you want.

steps.heading: Download as SVG
steps.body: Select SVG as your export format when downloading the finished graphic.

steps.heading: Use the SVG in your projects
steps.body: Apply the scalable file to logos, icons, or illustrations where resizing without quality loss matters.

faq.question: Why use SVG instead of PNG for a logo?
faq.answer: SVG files scale to any size without becoming blurry or pixelated, which PNGs can do at large sizes.

faq.question: Can every PNG be converted cleanly to SVG in Canva?
faq.answer: Simpler graphics like icons and logos tend to convert more cleanly than complex photographs.

faq.question: Is SVG conversion available on the free Canva plan?
faq.answer: Availability can depend on your plan, so it's worth checking your account's export options if SVG isn't showing up.
